title: Account Recovery Codes Created
subtitle: Save these codes in a safe place. You can use them to get back into your account if you lose access to your other login methods.

security_notice.title: Important Security Notice
security_notice.description: Download your recovery codes immediately. Each code can only be used once and cannot be viewed again after leaving this page.

download_section.title: Download Your Recovery Codes
download_section.description: Click the button below to download a text file containing your {{count}} recovery codes.

file_content.title: Account Recovery Codes
file_content.important: IMPORTANT: Keep these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.

error.copy_failed: Failed to copy codes. Please try again.
